    "R1.7",

  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.7": "The request centers on verifying reference accuracy, appropriate attribution, and coverage of relevant prior work for the claims made.",
    "RX.1": "Any citation assessment should transparently note uncertainty about completeness or ambiguous attributions.",
    "RX.2": "Avoid asserting novelty or definitive precedence unless the sources clearly support such claims.",
    "RX.3": "Limit work strictly to citation verification and coverage, not rewriting prose or evaluating methods or results.",
    "RX.4": "Careful citation handling prevents misattribution or omission that could unduly harm credited scholars or communities.",
    "RX.5": "Maintain clear traceability between each in-text citation and the corresponding source and indicate where citations are missing."
  }
}

rationale.R1.7: The request centers on verifying reference accuracy, appropriate attribution, and coverage of relevant prior work for the claims made.
rationale.RX.1: Any citation assessment should transparently note uncertainty about completeness or ambiguous attributions.
rationale.RX.2: Avoid asserting novelty or definitive precedence unless the sources clearly support such claims.
rationale.RX.3: Limit work strictly to citation verification and coverage, not rewriting prose or evaluating methods or results.
rationale.RX.4: Careful citation handling prevents misattribution or omission that could unduly harm credited scholars or communities.
rationale.RX.5: Maintain clear traceability between each in-text citation and the corresponding source and indicate where citations are missing.
